courseleaf.title: Population Biology, Master of Science
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Study

The Population Biology Graduate Group (PBGG) emphasizes programs of study and research leading to a Ph.D. degree. The PBGG concentrates on population biology as a broad discipline that unifies ecology, evolution, population genetics and phylogenetics. The course curriculum consists of a first-year core course offered by PBGG faculty, seminars, and advanced courses in population biology and related disciplines; chosen in consultation with a guidance committee.

The Master of Science is offered only as an en route degree.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Population Biology.
